name: codex-quota
description: A compact macOS quota companion for Codex.
author: MrPPFruit

scripts.smoke:accessory: SMOKE_EXPECT_CODEX_PRESENCE=present bash scripts/run-accessory-smoke.sh && SMOKE_EXPECT_CODEX_PRESENCE=absent bash scripts/run-accessory-smoke.sh
scripts.verify:accessory: npm run build:accessory && npm run smoke:accessory
